given: Sentry dashboard widget builder opens an existing widget saved before axisRange was introduced

should_find.finding: convertWidgetToBuilderStateParams leaves missing widget.axisRange undefined for existing widgets, so the builder applies dataset defaults and shows a different Y-axis range than the saved chart actually renders

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 01217a6efb90cd26f0f8ac8b33c4f255379fe21d. convertWidgetToBuilderStateParams leaves missing widget.axisRange undefined for existing widgets, so the builder applies dataset defaults and shows a different Y-axis range than the saved chart actually renders
